headline: ResMed (RMD) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of medical device company ResMed (NYSE:RMD) fell 2.6% in the afternoon session after its Chairman and CEO, Michael J. Farrell, sold shares worth $1.25 million.
